member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Workers.Activation.EmailFetch.AgentEmailFetchWorker
member.summary:
Phase 1 gather worker: fetches the agent's sent + inbox emails via Gmail, extracts the email signature from sent mail, and strips noise (quoted replies, boilerplate) from the corpus.
Pure compute — calls IGmailReader only. No storage, no DataServices.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Workers.Activation.EmailFetch.AgentEmailFetchWorker.#ctor(RealEstateStar.Domain.Shared.Interfaces.External.IGmailReader,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{RealEstateStar.Workers.Activation.EmailFetch.AgentEmailFetchWorker})
member.summary:
Phase 1 gather worker: fetches the agent's sent + inbox emails via Gmail, extracts the email signature from sent mail, and strips noise (quoted replies, boilerplate) from the corpus.
Pure compute — calls IGmailReader only. No storage, no DataServices.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Workers.Activation.EmailFetch.AgentEmailFetchWorker.ExtractSignature(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{RealEstateStar.Domain.Activation.Models.EmailMessage})
member.summary: Finds the most common signature block across sent emails by looking for the repeated trailing block that appears after a separator line (--) or "Best regards" / "Sincerely" / "Thanks" closings.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Workers.Activation.EmailFetch.AgentEmailFetchWorker.ExtractSignatureBlock(System.String)
member.summary: Extracts the trailing signature block from an email body. Looks for a "-- " separator line or common closing phrases.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Workers.Activation.EmailFetch.AgentEmailFetchWorker.ParseSignature(System.String)
member.summary: Parses a raw signature block text into structured fields.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Workers.Activation.EmailFetch.AgentEmailFetchWorker.StripNoise(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{RealEstateStar.Domain.Activation.Models.EmailMessage},RealEstateStar.Domain.Activation.Models.EmailSignature)
member.summary: Removes quoted reply blocks, "On ... wrote:" headers, and boilerplate from email bodies. Also strips signature blocks when a signature is known.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Workers.Activation.EmailFetch.AgentEmailFetchWorker.StripQuotedReplies(System.String)
member.summary: Strips quoted reply content ("> " lines and "On DATE, PERSON wrote:" blocks).
